notes: Ventura County Access database export format (.xls). All certificate data is in row 0 with positional columns. Commodities start at row 4 in columns 24-29. Row 1 has internal field names. Row 3 and row 25 have commodity column headers (page-break markers). Dates are Excel serial numbers. Production sites in cols 14-18 (up to 5, N/A = empty). Storage locations in cols 20 and 22 (N/A = empty). Col 19 appears unused. Col 21 appears to be authorized counties count or months.
